log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster.
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 20] FAIL! 30 necrotic damage. HP: 37/67
--- Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 18 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 4 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster.
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 27/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster.
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 21/67
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 19 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 130/135
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster.
→ Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 10/67
=== ROUND 7 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:16+12=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 fire damage. Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster HP: -3/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 7 rounds ===
